nodes.label: Playback state machine and variant rotation
nodes.norm_label: playback state machine and variant rotation

nodes.label: Dual I2C Bus Architecture
nodes.rationale: Internal I2C (GPIO32/33) for ES8388 codec only, external I2C (GPIO18/23) for OLED, RTC, PCF8574. Prevents tight coupling of audio and peripheral hardware; audio library manages internal bus independently.

nodes.label: Mode Selection on Button Press
nodes.rationale: getModeForTime() called only on button press, not polling. RTC optional at boot and can sync later. Reduces SD spam, saves power, mode change reflected after next press.

nodes.label: Power Loss Resets Playback Index
nodes.rationale: No persistent state recovery for playback index. EEPROM writes add latency and complexity. Last click timestamp still logged for recovery context.

nodes.label: Dynamic Button-to-Folder 1:1 Mapping
nodes.rationale: Available GPIO pins mapped 1:1 to type folders (alphabetically sorted). Simplifies button logic, folders discovered dynamically on SD scan, excess folders excluded.

nodes.label: Event Logging as Write Queue
nodes.rationale: Events buffered in RAM queue, flushed to SD when playback idle. Avoids log spam during playback, reduces SD wear, batches writes for efficiency. Daily JSON rotation YYYY-MM-DD.
